title: Case
description: A criminal prosecution (People v. …) as it appears on the PUBLIC record and is announced by the Queens County DA. There is NO structured case system exposed — the office publishes case activity only as press-release prose tagged by lifecycle category (arraignments 131, charges 127, indictments 119, court-cases 378). This schema is the aggregate, public-record-only structured resource that prose implies; it deliberately carries no sealed, non-public, or victim-identifying data.

stage.description: Current public stage in the prosecution lifecycle.

offense.description: Offense name as announced (e.g. 'Grand Larceny in the First Degree').

statute.description: NY Penal Law citation if published.

division.description: Prosecuting bureau/division (e.g. Major Crimes, Special Prosecutions, Supreme Court Trial, Appeals).

disposition.description: Public disposition/outcome if announced (e.g. convicted, pleaded guilty, acquitted, dismissed).

announcedDate.description: Date the office publicly announced this activity.

pressReleases.description: Links to the press release(s) that announced this case activity.
